chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr.B.A.No.S-145 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of bail application. 06.04.2023. Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl.P.G for the State. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- IRSHAD ALI SHAH J;- It is alleged that the applicants were found carrying with them through their Car 432 packets of Gutkas, duly packed in 08 sacks which is said to be substance injurious to human lives, for that they were booked and reported upon. 2. On having been refused post-arrest bail by learned 2nd Additional Sessions Judge, Mehar at Dadu, the applicants have sought for the same from this Court by way of instant application u/s. 497 Cr.PC. 3. Heard arguments and perused the record. 4. There is no independent witness to the incident. Only 08 packets of the Gutkas have been subjected to chemical examination; therefore, the liability of the applicants would be to that extent. The offence alleged against the applicants is not falling within the prohibitory clause. The case has finally been challaned and there is no apprehension of tampering with the evidence on the part of applicants. In these circumstances, a case for release of applicants on bail on point of further inquiry is made out. 5. In view of above, the applicants are admitted to bail subject to their furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of learned trial Court. 6. The instant bail application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE
